governingBody: Virginia corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Virginia prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: 1, 31, 127, 131
